data.body: DONE (config-loop, commit f23a976e). Implemented `rebar config` transparency command (ruff --show-settings pattern): prints every typed-config key with resolved value + the precedence layer it came from (cli>env>project>user>default), in aligned text or JSON. Design: extracted config._ordered_layers (shared layer assembly) so the new config.resolve_with_sources() resolves through the EXACT same layers as load_config — provenance can never disagree with the live load; added config.LAYER_ORDER. load_config behavior unchanged. Command lives in _commands/show_config.py (102 LOC), intercepted in _cli.main() like reconcile/review with NO store init (working-tree config reads only); owns its own --help. Verified across COMBINATIONS x LOCATIONS: per-layer provenance (default/user/project/env/cli), full-stack winner attribution, legacy .rebar/config.conf labeled 'project'/kind=legacy, value==load_config parity, text alignment on long values (jira.url), and identical/portable JSON across two clones (only file PATHS differ, no host leakage). Subagent review: PASS on all 5 hard constraints; fixed 1 MAJOR (hardcoded value-column width -> dynamic) + redundant test assertion; added legacy-conf + long-value-alignment tests. Full offline suite green: 1889 passed, 9 skipped (was 1877; +12 new tests). ACs met: (1) prints resolved values + source layer per key [done]; (2) wired across CLI + tests for output shape [done]. Unblocks f81a (docs).
